reviews.review_description:
This is another L/R color-coded shooter on rails (think Beat Saber). The graphics and visuals are pretty cool, and the atmosphere is beautiful. Keep working on this, devs! One question: how can I keep track of how many time-slows I have remaining?

l i n k t r . e e / q u a c k b i r t h

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Any feedback can contribute to better upgrades in the future. You can track the number of time-slow events at the top of the UI. On the right, there are a few clocks, with each round containing five of them.
